labels: sorghum panicle with no ergot, no honeydew, completely clean healthy panicle
sorghum panicle with slight ergot infection, few small honeydew droplets on 1-10% of spikelets
sorghum panicle with moderate ergot infection, honeydew droplets on 11-25% of spikelets
sorghum panicle with heavy ergot infection, extensive honeydew on 26-50% of spikelets, visible mold
sorghum panicle with severe ergot infection, entire panicle covered in honeydew, over 50% affected, sclerotia forming
